title: Meditation of Immersion
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Meditation of Immersion''' was a [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] [[The Force/Legends|Force]] [[Force power/Legends|technique]] that stilled the mental and physical state of the [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-user]] who performed it to a profound level. This allowed the user to attain an almost direct contact with the [[White Current/Legends|White Current]]. In this state, the Fallanassi could become completely invisible, or project images around them with vivid clarity.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
